retrieved_result: MEMBERS OF THE HAUPPAUGE FIRE DEPARTMENT IN ACTIVE MILITARY SERVICE Order Engraved 9/11 Memorial Bricks On Line We have added the ability to order and pay for an engraved 9/11 brick at our memorial.
